title: Detached Uninstaller and Runtime Removal

sources.reason: Detached uninstaller and runtime removal requirements.

riskAssessment.reason: Detached executor must not import object-project Runtime and must verify removal while preserving evidence and business files.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the complete serial remediation plan, including governance changes.

preReviewWarnings: Unconfirmed, modified, or unknown-owned files must remain; detached execution must emit final removal evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Detached uninstaller is self-contained in a system temp session and does not import object-project Runtime.
Execution verifies drift, removes confirmed Runtime/Managed Regions only, preserves business files and evidence, and emits a final receipt.
Unconfirmed, modified, or unknown-owned files fail closed with no deletion.
Focused tests and documentation cover detached independence, preservation, and removal verification.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: An uninstaller cannot depend on Runtime files it is about to remove and must prove removal without deleting business content or evidence.
constraints: Detached code is self-contained and uses only standard library inputs.
Ownership and drift are checked before deletion.
Evidence and project-owned files are retained and final receipt records verification.
intent.rationale: A detached, evidence-first executor makes Runtime removal independently verifiable.

rawUserRequest: 走完当前文档的流程；按计划逐个工单执行完整生命周期，包括 PR、合并、清理分支，直到全部工单完成。用户已授权所需确认范围。

declaredIntent.summary: Implement a detached, evidence-preserving Runtime removal executor.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Detached executor is independent of object-project Runtime.
Unconfirmed or drifted removal has zero writes.
Business files and evidence are preserved.
Confirmed Runtime removal emits final receipt and verification.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete serial remediation plan, including governance policy changes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
